response.step_by_step_log: Identified the concert performers from the on-screen graphics as Hololive 3rd Generation (Pekora, Flare, Noel, Marine). The song performed is '#Kierunne' (#きえるんね). Web search attempts for the full lyrics were unsuccessful in returning the text content, so I am setting those fields to null as per instructions.
response.global_summary: A lively concert performance by Hololive 3rd Generation members (Usada Pekora, Shiranui Flare, Shirogane Noel, and Houshou Marine) performing their original song "#Kierunne" (#きえるんね). The video features the song performance interspersed with concert crowd shots.

scenes.description: The Hololive 3rd Generation members start their performance on stage with choreography. On-screen text indicates the event 'hololive 3rd Generation Live' and the song title '#Kierunne'.
scenes.performer_in_video: Usada Pekora, Shiranui Flare, Shirogane Noel, Houshou Marine

scenes.description: Concert crowd waiting for the performance to start with glowing sticks. The screen introduces the Hololive 3rd Gen performers.
Concert crowd after the performance ends.
